languages.text: {n}Обступающие вас меровцы кажутся напряженными. Хотя сами вы больше не ощущаете давления в голове, они, кажется, все еще страдают от длительного воздействия визга Погонщицы.{/n}
{n}The Merovians surrounding you seem tense. Although you no longer feel any pressure in your head, they seem to still be suffering from the lingering effects of the Drover's screech.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Обступающие вас меровцы кажутся напряженными. Хотя сами вы больше не ощущаете давления в голове, они, кажется, все еще страдают от длительного воздействия визга Погонщицы.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The Merovians surrounding you seem tense. Although you are no longer feeling any pressure in your head, they still seem to be suffering from the lingering effects of the Drover's screeching.{/n}
{n}The Merovians surrounding you seem tense. Although you no longer feel any pressure in your head, they seem to still be suffering from the lingering effects of the Drover's screech.{/n}

{n}The Merovians who greet you do not seem any less hostile than before. Although you are no longer feeling any pressure in your head, the Merovians still seem to be suffering from the lingering effects of the Drover's screeching.{/n}
{n}The Merovians surrounding you seem tense. Although you are no longer feeling any pressure in your head, they still seem to be suffering from the lingering effects of the Drover's screeching.{/n}
{n}The Merovians surrounding you seem tense. Although you no longer feel any pressure in your head, they seem to still be suffering from the lingering effects of the Drover's screech.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたに挨拶するメロヴィアンは、以前と変わらない敵意を帯びているように見える。頭への圧迫を感じなくなったものの、メロヴィアンは依然として、ドルーバーの叫びの余波に苦しんでいるように見える。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians who greet you do not seem any less hostile than before. Although you are no longer feeling any pressure in your head, the Merovians still seem to be suffering from the lingering effects of the Drover's screeching.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Etrafındaki Merovlular gergin görünüyor. Başındaki ağrı şu an için geçmiş olsa da görünüşe göre onlar, Çoban'ın çığlığının süregelen etkilerinden hâlâ muzdarip.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians surrounding you seem tense. Although you no longer feel any pressure in your head, they seem to still be suffering from the lingering effects of the Drover's screech.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Etrafındaki Merovlular gergin görünüyor. Başındaki ağrı şu an için geçmiş olsa da görünüşe göre onlar, Çoban'ın çığlığının süregelen etkilerinden hâlâ muzdarip.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你周围的梅罗夫人神色紧张。虽然你脑中的压迫感已经消失，但他们似乎仍在承受拒生花尖啸的残留之苦。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians surrounding you seem tense. Although you no longer feel any pressure in your head, they seem to still be suffering from the lingering effects of the Drover's screech.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你周围的梅罗夫人神色紧张。虽然你脑中的压迫感已经消失，但他们似乎仍在承受拒生花尖啸的残留之苦。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die umstehenden Merovianer wirken angespannt. Während du in deinem Kopf keinen Druck mehr spürst, scheinen sie noch unter dem Einfluss der Schreie des Treibers zu stehen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians surrounding you seem tense. Although you no longer feel any pressure in your head, they seem to still be suffering from the lingering effects of the Drover's screech.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die umstehenden Merovianer wirken angespannt. Während du in deinem Kopf keinen Druck mehr spürst, scheinen sie noch unter dem Einfluss der Schreie des Treibers zu stehen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les Meroviens qui vous entourent ont l'air crispés. Même si vous ne ressentez plus aucune pression dans votre tête, eux semblent toujours souffrir des effets persistants des hurlements du Chasseur.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians surrounding you seem tense. Although you no longer feel any pressure in your head, they seem to still be suffering from the lingering effects of the Drover's screech.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les Meroviens qui vous entourent ont l'air crispés. Même si vous ne ressentez plus aucune pression dans votre tête, eux semblent toujours souffrir des effets persistants des hurlements du Chasseur.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los merovianos que te rodean están tensos. Aunque no sientes ya presión en la cabeza, ellos aún parecen sufrir los efectos residuales del chillido del Pastor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians surrounding you seem tense. Although you no longer feel any pressure in your head, they seem to still be suffering from the lingering effects of the Drover's screech.{/n}
